ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., SG, PF, PG) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is currently part of */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "contract_start" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player associated with the stats */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game associated with the stats */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "gp" REAL /* Games played */,
  "gs" REAL /* Games started */,
  "min" REAL /* Minutes played */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "offr" REAL /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "defr" REAL /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "rpg" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "apg" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "spg" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "bpg" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "tpg" REAL /* Total points generated */,
  "fpg" REAL /* Fouls per game */,
  "ato" REAL /* Assists to turnovers ratio */,
  "per" REAL /* Player efficiency rating */,
  "two_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of 2-point attempts */,
  "two_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of 2-point shots made */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of 3-point attempts */,
  "three_point_made" INTEGER /* Number of 3-point shots made */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of free throw attempts */,
  "free_throw_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., SG, PF) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Coach's area of specialization (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the report relates to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, trend) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analytics report */,
  "detailed_report" TEXT /* Detailed report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
